name: Lemon Oregano Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the shallot, mustard, oregano, and 1/2 of the lemon juice until well combined.
2. Gradually add the olive oil to the mixture while continuously whisking vigorously. Continue adding the oil slowly, whisking after each addition, until the sauce coats the back of a spoon.
3. Add the remaining lemon juice and season with salt and pepper. Adjust the seasoning as desired.
This vinaigrette is delicious when drizzled over sliced beefsteak tomatoes and sprinkled with crumbled blue cheese if desired.
